candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; exact total revenue line.
Not revenue; this is cost line.
Non-GAAP and appears unpopulated; less preferred than reported revenue.
Also a valid top-line revenue label; same values as Total Revenue, useful as fallback across years.

variables.notes: Using reported top-line revenue labels as priority list; later code should take the first available non-missing value.

candidates.why: Direct reported COGS line.
Equivalent alternate COGS label with same values; useful as fallback.

candidates.row_label: Finished goods and goods for resale
candidates.why: Inventory balance sheet item, not income statement COGS expense.
Explicit balancing row, so should not be preferred.

candidates.row_label: Impairment in Cost of Goods Sold
candidates.why: Impairment component, not full COGS.

variables.notes: Using direct COGS line with equivalent alternate label as fallback.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A overhead component.
Administrative overhead, but appears to include a separate D&A/impairment subcomponent.
Cleaner administrative overhead component excluding the separate D&A/impairment row.
Could be overhead, but this statement's other operating lines appear mixed with non-core/FX items and may be noisy.
Personnel costs are often SG&A, but here likely span broader functions including production, so less suitable.
Balance sheet liability, not income statement expense.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A total row is present. Selected the best overhead components while avoiding totals and avoiding Administrative expenses because it appears to include a separate D&A/impairment subcomponent.

candidates.why: Explicit R&D expense embedded in cost of goods sold.
Most semantically direct R&D label; use as preferred fallback even though preview is empty.
Balance sheet capitalized development asset, not period R&D expense.
Balance sheet amortization contra-asset, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: Using R&D labels as a priority list. The direct 'R&D' row is most semantically correct; 'Research and Development in COR/COGS' is the explicit embedded R&D expense fallback.

candidates.why: Broader finance-cost line; acceptable fallback if specific interest expense is unavailable.
Direct interest expense line; best match.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific lease-interest component, narrower than total interest expense.
Broad finance expense category, not specifically interest.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest component, narrower and less preferred.

variables.notes: Using direct interest expense first, with broader financial expenses as fallback if the specific line is missing in some years.

candidates.why: Explicitly includes minority interest, so less preferred for BE because BE should exclude MIB when possible.
Appears to equal total assets, so not an equity line.
Best available equity label that does not explicitly mention minority interest; likely total shareholders' equity.

variables.notes: Selected the best available equity line that does not explicitly include minority interest. Since no separate non-controlling interest line is shown, MIB is set to empty to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: This is total equity including minority interest, not a standalone minority-interest line.

variables.notes: No standalone minority interest / non-controlling interests row is present in the balance sheet preview. Per instructions, using [] rather than a total-equity-with-minority line to avoid double counting.
